data.title: Investors of Klarna Group plc urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP regarding losses, securities litigation partner James Wilson.
data.description: Are you an investor who experienced losses in Klarna? James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging affected investors to reach out to him to explore their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Klarna through the registration statement and subsequent transactions, it is advisable to contact Wilson directly to discuss your situation.

data.title: Learning Management System Market to reach $100.70 billion by 2032, growing from $30.92 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 18.4%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 22, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets™ indicates significant growth potential in the Learning Management System Market. The market is forecasted to increase from USD 30.92 billion in 2025 to USD 100.70 billion by 2032, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.4%. The report includes a comprehensive analysis presented in 410 market data Tables and supported by 60 Figures spread across 374. This substantial growth prospect highlights the expanding opportunities within the learning management sector.

data.title: Global sulfosuccinate market value projected to rise from USD 508.6 million in 2025 to USD 910.8 million by 2035, with a 6.0% CAGR.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, it has been projected by industry analysis from Future Market Insights (FMI) that the worldwide sulfosuccinate market will experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.0% in the upcoming decade. Starting at USD 508.6 million in 2025, the market is anticipated to reach USD 910.8 million by 2035. This growth trend is attributed to various factors in the market landscape.

data.title: Study compares ultrasound-guided carpal tunnel release to open release, highlights advantages. Largest multi-center study.
data.description: A recent study published in the Journal of Hand Surgery Global Online highlighted the benefits of ultrasound-guided carpal tunnel release compared to open carpal tunnel release. The research, conducted by Sonex Health, Inc. in EAGAN, Minn., showed that this procedure offers unique advantages. The study, which was released on Jan. 22, 2026, emphasizes the superiority of ultrasound-guided carpal tunnel release for patients. This innovation signifies a significant advancement in hand surgery, providing opportunities for improved outcomes for individuals suffering from carpal tunnel syndrome.

data.title: Mercuryo partners with Visa for crypto-to-fiat off-ramping globally via Visa Direct. Fast and user-friendly service.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 22, 2026, Mercuryo, a global payments infrastructure platform, disclosed a new collaboration with Visa, a prominent player in digital payments. This partnership aims to facilitate swift and convenient conversion of cryptocurrencies to fiat currencies worldwide. Through Visa Direct, the real-time payments platform by Visa, users can now seamlessly off-ramp their crypto assets in an efficient manner. This partnership is set to enhance the global access and usability of cryptocurrencies, offering enhanced capabilities for users looking to transition between digital and traditional currencies.

data.title: Swin Cash becomes President, Diana Flores, Molly Levinson, and Sloane Stephens join WSF Board of Trustees. Stacey Allaster appointed Chair-Elect.
data.description: Swin Cash has been appointed President of the Women's Sports Foundation, while Diana Flores, Molly Levinson, and Sloane Stephens have joined the Board of Trustees. Stacey Allaster has been named Board Chair-Elect. This announcement was made in New York on January 22, 2026, by the WSF.

data.title: Craig Rosen appointed CFO of Virtualitics to accelerate company expansion. PASADENA, Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: Virtualitics, the Mission AI Company based in Pasadena, California, has recently named Craig Rosen as its new Chief Financial Officer on January 22, 2026. With a background in fast-growing companies, public sector experience, and international expertise, Rosen is expected to drive the company's expansion forward. This strategic move aims to leverage Rosen's skills to accelerate growth and enhance financial operations at Virtualitics.

data.title: By Feb 2026, Ripple aims to test $2.05 resistance for XRP. Short-term target at $1.98, support at $1.86. Bullish breakout level $2.05.
data.description: Prediction Summary for XRP price: In the short term (1 week), the target is at $1.98. For the medium term (1 month), the forecast range is between $1.85 and $2.10. The bullish breakout level is set at $2.05 with critical support at $1.86.

data.title: EverDriven awards $20,000 to 30 schools/districts through 2025 Driving Access Forward Initiative, addressing education barriers.
data.description: In Denver, EverDriven, a prominent provider of Alternative Student Transportation, revealed the winners of its 2025 Driving Access Forward micro-grant program. This initiative awarded a total of $20,000 to 30 schools and districts in order to assist in eliminating obstacles to education for students and families dealing with instability. Created to aid students, families, and school personnel across the country by tackling needs identified by local communities, the Driving Access Forward campaign by EverDriven has made a significant impact.

data.title: Brazos Safety Systems partners with Fly Compton Foundation to guide youth into aviation careers, offering training and mentorship.
data.description: Based in Fort Worth, Texas, Brazos Safety Systems, a renowned provider of Flight Data Monitoring solutions for airplane and helicopter aircraft globally, has revealed its backing for the Fly Compton Foundation. This nonprofit organization is committed to introducing, instructing, and inspiring young individuals towards professions in aviation and aerospace by offering practical training, STEM education, and guidance. Fly Compton facilitates hands-on exposure to aircraft and educational opportunities for aspiring aviation experts.

data.title: Black Friday 2025 showed growth in red light therapy purchases, revealing consumer trends favoring flexibility and performance.
data.description: In New York on January 22, 2026, it was reported that red light therapy is increasingly becoming a part of regular wellness practices. The behavior of consumers is evolving, as shown by data from Black Friday 2025. BestQool's analysis of their sales data from that day revealed significant year-over-year growth in North America.

data.title: Investigators at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP are looking into claims on behalf of investors of F5 from Oct 28, 2024 - Oct 27, 2025. Losses? Contact James Wilson.
data.description: If you bought or obtained F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, and incurred losses, contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP's Securities Litigation Partner, James (Josh) Wilson. He encourages affected investors to reach out directly to explore their options for potential compensation.

data.title: Woori IO, an OSR Company, plans to accelerate commercial launch after FDA clarification on non-medical wearables.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington on January 22, 2026, Woori IO, a company specializing in next-gen noninvasive glucose monitoring, addressed the recent guidelines by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration on non-medical-grade wearables. Woori IO is focused on developing innovative technologies for glucose monitoring.
ZELENSKIY SAYS HE SPOKE WITH TRUMP ABOUT SECURITY GUARANTEES, ECONOMIC PACKAGE

data.title: States urged to raise tobacco taxes to reduce use and fund health programs - Report suggests billions in new revenue can be generated.
data.description: A recent report suggests that states should raise tobacco taxes substantially in order to decrease tobacco consumption and generate billions in additional revenue for supporting important health programs. The report emphasizes the need for this action to curb tobacco use effectively and fund vital tobacco prevention initiatives. It was released on January 22, 2026, and advocates for a significant increase in tobacco taxes to address public health concerns.

data.title: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Fermi. Contact James Wilson if you suffered losses.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses in Fermi to reach out to him directly to explore their potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities related to Fermi's common stock following or connected to a specific event, Wilson advises you to speak with him to discuss your options.

data.title: 89% of finance pros report revenue gains; 65% using AI. NVIDIA survey of 800+ shows steady AI budgets. Open source models drive adoption in trading & risk mgmt.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by NVIDIA surveyed over 800 finance professionals and revealed that 65% of them are currently utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) in their work. The adoption of AI in areas such as trading and risk management is being largely propelled by open source models and AI agents. This trend is indicative of a significant shift towards incorporating AI technologies in the finance industry, as demonstrated by the high percentage of professionals actively engaging with these tools.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP are investigating claims for investors of Bitdeer Technologies. Investors with losses between June 6, 2024, and November 10, 2025, urged to contact James Wilson.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Bitdeer to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Bitdeer during the period from June 6, 2024, to November 10, 2025, and are interested in exploring potential avenues, please get in touch with him directly.
